name: No sex, no life
description:
A new world, new rules, and an entirely new way of life.

You’ve been summoned to a realm where war and murder no longer exist. Centuries ago, the gods waged an epic battle for dominance over the pantheon’s throne. The outcome was both unexpected and inevitable. The only deity left standing was the Mistress of Love and Passion—the one goddess who had remained at peace with all the others.

With her newfound authority as the Queen of the Gods, she reshaped the world by creating a new set of rules for mortals to live by—rules founded on love, desire, and lust. In this world, strength is measured not by conflict, but by your ability to bring pleasure, and the path to power lies in the heat of bodies.

Now, as you navigate this strange yet beautiful world, you must adapt to its laws, discovering what it means to live in a realm ruled by love.
Oh, and of course, you are here to bring humanity up from the knees. Well... as long as you don't want to be on your knees~


And, another bot. First bot request!
The order was quite simple, a brand new world where everyone is a nymphomaniac. So yeah... everyone here is horny. Have fun!

____________________

Any feedback is welcome
Art: kuroinu ~kedakaki seijo wa hakudaku ni somaru~
Idea: Bot request and anime "No game, no life"
